title: Vibe Title En Synthetic Prophecy Master
sourceTitle: Vibe Title En Synthetic Prophecy Master Prompt
prompt:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Synthetic Prophecy",
  "master_prompt": "A hyper-realistic, symmetrical medium close-up of The Protagonist situated in a sterile, high-tech optics laboratory. The subject is wearing a structured, avant-garde white neoprene cowl that wraps tightly around the head and neck, mimicking the silhouette of a nun's habit but with the texture of modern athletic gear. They wear oversized, thick-rimmed circular white sunglasses that are completely opaque, reflecting the clinical lights of the room. Behind the subject's head is a physical, circular LED ring light mounted on the white wall, creating a practical 'technological halo' effect. The lighting is soft, diffuse, and shadowless (high-key), emphasizing the texture of the skin pores and the fabric weave. Shot on a Hasselblad H6D-100c with an 80mm f/2.8 lens for razor-sharp detail. The aesthetic is 'Clinical Couture' mixed with 'Sci-Fi Divinity.' Color grading simulates Kodak Ektar 100 with fine grain, keeping the whites creamy rather than blown out. No neon, no digital illustrations.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Editorial Fashion meets Sci-Fi Surrealism",
    "priorities": "Symmetry, Texture, Monochromatic Palette",
    "device_profile": "Hasselblad H6D-100c"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "9:16",
    "composition": "Central Symmetrical Composition",
    "layout": "Head and Shoulders Portrait",
    "camera_angle": "Eye Level (Direct Confrontation)",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Female",
    "identity": "The Protagonist",
    "demographics": "Ageless, ethereal",
    "face": "Neutral, impassive, lips slightly parted",
    "hair": "Completely concealed by the headpiece",
    "body": "Static, upright posture",
    "expression": "Stoic, judging, impenetrable",
    "pose": "Facing forward, chin slightly elevated"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "Avant-garde Cowl/Headpiece",
        "material": "Neoprene/Structured Cotton",
        "color": "Clinical White",
        "fit": "Tight, form-fitting"
      },
      {
        "item": "High-Collar Tunic",
        "material": "Heavy Silk or Synthetic Blend",
        "color": "Cream/White",
        "fit": "Structured"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "Oversized Circular Sunglasses",
        "color": "White Frames / Black Lenses",
        "material": "Acetate / Glass",
        "brand_style": "Futuristic Couture"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Sterile Optics Laboratory or Minimalist Studio",
    "surfaces": "Matte white walls, polished metal fixtures",
    "depth": "Shallow depth of field, background is a blur of white",
    "atmosphere": "Clinical, silent, air-conditioned",
    "lens_interaction": "Sharp focus on the lips and eyewear frames"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "Large Beauty Dish (Frontal)",
    "fill": "White Bounce Boards (Left and Right)",
    "rim": "Halo-effect Ring Light (Background)",
    "shadows": "Minimal, soft under the nose and chin",
    "color_temperature": "5600K (Daylight Balanced)",
    "sensor_flare": "None"
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "Prime Portrait Lens",
    "focal_length": "80mm",
    "aperture": "f/4.0",
    "focus": "Locked on the bridge of the sunglasses",
    "sensor_format": "Medium Format (53.4 x 40.0mm)",
    "perspective_distortion": "None (Flattering compression)"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "Monochromatic High-Key (Whites, Creams, Beiges)",
    "tonality": "Soft contrast, preserved highlights",
    "texture": "Fine organic grain (Kodak Ektar simulation)",
    "digital_sharpening": "Moderate (emphasizing fabric texture)",
    "chromatic_aberration": "None"
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "neon",
    "cyberpunk",
    "night time",
    "dark background",
    "low resolution",
    "cartoon",
    "3d render style",
    "messy hair",
    "casual clothing"
  ]
}
